evals.prompt: How is driftroast's content performing? Pull Search Console and tell me what to update next.
evals.expected_output: A performance report with per-pillar rollups, striking-distance queries, measured cannibalization, decaying pages, uncovered-query candidates; every figure measured/derived; actions fed back to map+calendar.

assertions.text: pillar rollups are derived from measured GSC rows
assertions.name: rollups_measured

assertions.text: if GSC not configured, honest 'unavailable' with no invented metrics
assertions.name: honest_degrade
